channel.title: 🙋Get Help - Frontity Community Forum
channel.description:
Topics in the '🙋Get Help' category The “Get Help” category is the place for asking generic technical questions about Frontity
or about how to solve a specific issue you’re having in your Frontity project.
You can contribute to the project by providing support to these current unanswered questions

item.title: How can use Frontity with Tutor LMS
item.dc:creator: arafa99999
item.description:
How can use Frontity with Tutor LMS

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: How can use Frontity with Tutor LMS

item.title: Applying updates in server.js custom handler and updating the state in client.js
item.dc:creator: noah
item.description:
I’m having trouble getting server.js to update existing data in a way that the state is updated in the client.

I needed to access some external data using an API key, so I created server.js and client.js files and defined the handler in server.js and custom actions in client.js. In the handler, I set the data as shown below. This updates state on the server but in the browser state it is still the same as when it first loaded in the app.

state.source.data[link] = {
  isForum: true,
  isReady: true,
  messages: [...messages]
};

In the client, I fetch the data from the custom handler with the pattern I defined. I added the option force: true as suggested elsewhere in this forum. I expected that adding this option would be enough to force refresh the data set in the handler. I see the component attempt to refresh but the data is the same, which can be confirmed in the console.

await actions.source.fetch("/messages/", { force: true });

I hope someone can help me correctly update the state of existing data from server.js to client.js.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Applying updates in server.js custom handler and updating the state in client.js

item.title: Sentry error, but I'm not using Sentry
item.dc:creator: calore912
item.description:
Hi all! Please help me solve the problem. I got a Sentry error (I’m attaching a screenshot), but I don’t use it in my project.

I worked with forms and installed two packages for the phone field and select, and therefore thought that this was possible because of them. But removing the packages did not solve the issue. Moreover, I completely reinstalled React and Frontity, did NOT install these packages and the error did not go away. Perhaps Frontity itself somehow uses it?

Thanks in advance everyone!

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Sentry error, but I'm not using Sentry

item.title: How to reach live person on Brother Printer Support
item.dc:creator: mooviiesjakhaas
item.description:
Navigating Brother Printer Support +1-888-966-6097 can be crucial when you encounter issues with your Brother printer or need assistance with setup, installation, or troubleshooting. Brother offers various support options, including a dedicated support number, to assist users in resolving printer-related problems. In this guide, we will explore how to navigate Brother Printer Support +1-888-966-6097, with a focus on the support number:

**1. Prepare Information Before Calling:

  • Before reaching out to Brother Printer Support, gather essential information, including your printer model, serial number, and a clear description of the issue.
  • Having this information ready will expedite the troubleshooting process.

**2. Locate the Brother Support Number:

  • Visit the official Brother Support website at https://support.brother.com/.
  • Look for the “Contact Us” or “Support” section on the website.
  • Find the support number for your region. Different countries may have specific numbers.

**3. Toll-Free Support Numbers:

  • Brother often provides toll-free support numbers for different regions.
  • Look for a toll-free number associated with your country or region to avoid incurring additional charges.

**4. Check Working Hours:

  • Note the working hours of the Brother Printer Support. Support services may be available during specific hours, depending on your location.
  • Be mindful of time zone differences if you are calling an international support number.

**5. Dial the Support Number:

  • Use your phone to dial the Brother Printer Support number you found on the official website.
  • Follow the prompts provided by the automated system to connect to the appropriate support department.

**6. Provide Necessary Information:

  • When connected to a support representative, be ready to provide the information you prepared earlier, such as the printer model and a detailed description of the issue.
  • Clear and concise information helps support agents diagnose and address the problem more efficiently.

**7. Follow Troubleshooting Steps:

  • The support representative may guide you through a series of troubleshooting steps. Follow their instructions carefully.
  • If you’ve already attempted certain troubleshooting steps, communicate this to the support agent to streamline the process.

**8. Remote Assistance:

  • In some cases, Brother Printer Support may offer remote assistance. This involves allowing a support agent to access your computer or printer to diagnose and fix the issue.
  • Only grant remote access to official Brother support personnel to ensure security.

**9. Take Note of Reference Numbers:

  • If your issue requires further investigation or follow-up, the support agent may provide a reference or case number.
  • Keep this information for future reference or if you need to follow up on the status of your support request.

**10. Ask for Additional Resources:

  • In addition to phone support, inquire about other resources that may be available, such as online documentation, manuals, or FAQs.
  • Brother may have additional self-help resources that can assist you in resolving common issues.

**11. Feedback and Follow-Up:

  • After the support interaction, provide feedback if prompted. This helps Brother improve its support services.
  • If the issue persists or you have further questions, don’t hesitate to follow up with the support team using the reference number provided.

**12. Alternative Support Channels:

  • If calling is not convenient, explore alternative support channels such as live chat, email support, or online forums.
  • The official Brother website will have information on these options.

**13. Check Warranty and Coverage:

  • If your printer is still under warranty, inquire about warranty coverage and support options available.
  • Brother may provide additional assistance or replacements for covered issues.

**14. Document Solutions:

  • If the support agent provides solutions or workarounds, document them for future reference. This can be helpful if you encounter similar issues later on.

**15. Consider In-Person Support:

  • Depending on the nature of the problem, ask if there are authorized service centers or technicians in your area that can provide in-person support.

By following these steps, you can effectively navigate Brother Printer Support +1-888-966-6097 and address issues with your printer. Remember that the support number is just one of several channels available, and choosing the most suitable option depends on your preferences and the nature of the problem you’re facing.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: How to reach live person on Brother Printer Support

item.title: Content changes are not applied on deploy (Vercel)
item.dc:creator: calore912
item.description:
Hi all! Please help me solve the problem! I’m deploying my project in Vercel, everything works well. But when I make changes to the content, they are not applied to the deployed site. On the local server, all changes take effect immediately, but on Vercel they do not.

Obviously, the data is cached somewhere (most likely on Vercel), but I can’t figure out where exactly and how to solve this. By the way, there are no caching plugins installed in WordPress.

Thanks in advance everyone!

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Content changes are not applied on deploy (Vercel)

item.title: Deploy Frontity build file to cPanel
item.dc:creator: ianchoo2000
item.description:
I have purchased a web domain and a web hosting that contains its own cPanel. I have also build my Frontity project as well. I also made sure that my web hosting supports Node.js. After updating the node and npm versions to match my machine that develops the web app, I then followed these steps to try and get the web hosting to work:

  1. I ensured that my package.json contains the domain name. ie: “homepage”: “https://mydomain.com”
  2. I created the build file using npx frontity build. This produces the build directory which contains the static folder and server.js file. I then zipped both files under a zip file called build.zip
  3. I uploaded the build.zip file to cPanel, in which I extracted its contents inside the /public_html directory within my web hosting.
  4. I then cd into my build folder, and ran npx frontity serve to run the website, as suggested by moderator juanma in this deployment for Frontity topic. However, on my screen, it just shows 403 Forbidden Access to this resource on the server is denied.
  5. I then created a .htaccess at at the /public_html directory, using Finoy Francis’s answer at Step 5 for routing i believe. However it still shows the same 403 Forbidden Access error.

What steps should I take from this point forward?

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Deploy Frontity build file to cPanel

item.title: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with “Frontity (AWSM F1 Starter Theme)”
item.dc:creator: abhishek.kumar
item.description:
Hello Everyone,
I’m using AWSM F1 Starter Theme for my project, I have integrated contact form 7, WP-comments package seamlessly. But, after integrating the Frontity Yoast SEO package the web app is not working. The yoast tags are not appearing and also the post details page is not working.

Please Note : I have the latest Yoast SEO plugin installed in my WordPress installation and Yoast head tags are appearing in JSON file. I have checked via POSTMAN. Please suggest any solution.

Any sort of help will be highly appreciated. Thanks in the advance.

9 posts - 5 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Yoast SEO package conflict issue with “Frontity (AWSM F1 Starter Theme)”

item.title:
How to remove

tags from the post.excerpt.rendered?
item.dc:creator: williamdlord
item.description:
Hello, I am going through the Finishing Touches > Other Things to Do section of the Frontity Tutorial. I am on the first step: Show the post excerpt on the listings page. I have done everything I want to do for this step, except for whatever reason the excerpt has

tags that I have not been able to get rid of as shown below:

I have noticed that these tags also exist in the meta content from the previous step, SEO and head tags. Here is what my code looks like in the list.js file (Note: the PostLink component is only a styled div):

return (
    <Items>
      {data.items.map((item) => {
        const post = state.source[item.type][item.id];
        return (
          <Link link={post.link}>
            <PostLink>
              <h2>{post.title.rendered}</h2>
              <em>{post.excerpt.rendered}</em>
            </PostLink>
            <hr />
          </Link>
        );
      })}

Hopefully that code formatting turns out okay, I would have posted an image but I’m only allowed to to post one as a new user.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source:
How to remove

tags from the post.excerpt.rendered?

item.title: Link with id in URL
item.dc:creator: calore912
item.description:
Hi everyone! Can you help me please with the problem? I need a Link component to another page with a URL that has a block ID. That is, I need that after clicking on Link on the next page, the scroll moves to a specific block, the id of which was in the url.

Also, the user can give a link containing the id to another user and when opening the site, scroll to this block.

Problem 1.
If I use /services#serv1 in Link, then when I go to Link, it converts the URL to /service/#serv1 and, accordingly, the page does not open

Problem 2.
If I go directly to the site with the link /services#serv1, the services page opens, but an error occurs and the content is not displayed.

How to solve this problem?

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Link with id in URL

item.title: 500 error when trying to fetch posts or go to blog page! Happening on two of my Frontity sites with no changes to code or Wordpress
item.dc:creator: techno_cowgirl
item.description:
I had a terrifying incident with my website occur a week ago where I accidentally permanently deleted ALL of my site’s files in FTP thanks to my rushed state + laggy older computer. Luckily my hosting company had a backup from just one day prior to the accident and was able to restore the files. But something strange happened when the site went back up.

At first everything seemed fine. I loaded the page, exhaled a sigh of relief, and worked on some other things. But the next day I went to my site and the page crashed. I saw that my component rendering the last 3 blog posts was the problem. Got a 500 error when trying to get the posts. So I took the blog cards component off the homepage and redeployed then went to work trying to fix the issue.

I noticed that not only was the blog cards not working but the /blog path wasn’t working either. It showed a 500 trying to get the posts and rendered a 404 page. I went into Wordpress Pages section and noticed that the usual text denoting the blog page wasn’t there although the homepage had the text saying it was the homepage. I set the blog page under Settings → Reading and the text came back next to my blog page, but nothing was fixed on my website.

I haven’t changed anything in my Frontity settings. I tell it what my homepage and postsPage are in there. (in state.source… “postsPage”: “/blog”, “homepage”: “/homepage”,).

The weirdest thing is that I have a bunch of custom post types and ACF custom fields and all of that is working perfectly fine. It’s just getting the posts! And the individual posts themselves are still working on my site if you know the link.

My site is albionridgedesigns.com, my Wordpress is at wptemplate.albionridgedesigns.com, and my repo (which I have temporarily made public) is on Github, the organization is Albion-Ridge-Designs and the repo is albion-ridge-designs. Appreciate any help, I’m stumped and really bummed by this.

2 posts - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: 500 error when trying to fetch posts or go to blog page! Happening on two of my Frontity sites with no changes to code or Wordpress

item.title: Cannot Deploy to Vercel
item.dc:creator: maniutin
item.description:
Hi!

Having trouble deploying to Vercel.

Here’s the log:

Here’s my package.json:

{
  "name": "oddboll",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Frontity project",
  "keywords": [
    "frontity"
  ],
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=10.0.0",
    "npm": ">=6.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "frontity dev",
    "build": "frontity build",
    "serve": "frontity serve"
  },
  "prettier": {},
  "dependencies": {
    "@frontity/core": "^1.16.0",
    "@frontity/html2react": "^1.7.0",
    "@frontity/mars-theme": "./packages/mars-theme",
    "@frontity/tiny-router": "^1.4.4",
    "@frontity/wp-source": "^1.11.7",
    "dayjs": "^1.11.9",
    "frontity": "^1.17.2",
    "oddboll": "file:packages/oddboll"
  }
}

I tried this solution but it did not help. I also tried changing node version to 16.x both inside package.json and in Vercel settings but that gave me Error: Found "engines" in "package.json" with an invalid Node.js version range: "16.x". Please set "engines": { "node": "12.x" } in your "package.json" file to upgrade to Node.js 12.

4 posts - 2 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Cannot Deploy to Vercel

item.title: How can I deploy the files in the build folder to Azure?"
item.dc:creator: sheikhzainulabideen4
item.description:
Hello,

I’m curious if anyone has experience deploying files from the build folder to an Azure server. If so, could you please provide some guidance?

Thank you in advance.

Fernando"

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: How can I deploy the files in the build folder to Azure?"

item.title: Error: Found `engines` in `package.json` with an invalid Node.js version range: "16.x". Please set "engines": { "node": "12.x" } in your `package.json` file to upgrade to Node.js 12
item.dc:creator: walter.h.clayton
item.description:
Hello, I am trying to deploy my project to Vercel, after npx vercel I get this error message
“Error: Found engines in package.json with an invalid Node.js version range: “16.x”.
Please set “engines”: { “node”: “12.x” } in your package.json file to upgrade to Node.js 12.”

which does not make sense to me because it seems like the 12.x version is disabled in Vercel

Vercel Documentation

Using the Node.js Runtime with Serverless Functions

Learn how to use the Node.js runtime to compile Node.js Serverless Functions on Vercel.

Once I update the package to { “node”: “12.x” } I then get this error after running npx vercel:
Error: Command “npm run build” exited with 1

The build also gives me these warnings:
WARN! Due to builds existing in your configuration file, the Build and Development Settings defined in your Project Settings will not apply. Learn More: Errors | Vercel Docs
12:04:43.813 > Installing Builder: @frontity/now
12:04:47.171 WARN! npm WARN deprecated @now/node-bridge@1.3.1: “@now/node-bridge” is deprecated and will stop receiving updates January 2021. Please use “@vercel/node-bridge” instead.

and errors:
isModuleDeclaration has been deprecated, please migrate to isImportOrExportDeclaration
12:05:05.075 at isModuleDeclaration (/vercel/path1/node_modules/@babel/types/lib/validators/generated/index.js:2748:35)
12:05:05.075 at PluginPass.Program (/vercel/path1/node_modules/babel-plugin-lodash/lib/index.js:102:44)

4 posts - 3 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Error: Found `engines` in `package.json` with an invalid Node.js version range: "16.x". Please set "engines": { "node": "12.x" } in your `package.json` file to upgrade to Node.js 12

item.title: Error al correr frontity
item.dc:creator: max.comfachoco
item.description:
Hola tengo este error cuando intento correr frontity

(node:10424) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection
(Use node --trace-warnings ... to show where the warning was created)
(node:10424) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.

Error: ./node_modules/core-js/modules/es.regexp.exec.js 1:3
Module parse failed: Unexpected character ‘’ (1:3)
You may need an appropriate loader to handle this file type, currently no loaders are configured to process this file. See Concepts | webpack
(Source code omitted for this binary file)
@ (webpack)-hot-middleware/client.js 1:205-249
@ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/donalimax/client.ts

If you need help please visit https://community.frontity.org/.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Error al correr frontity

item.title: Error node:10424

(Use node --trace-warnings ... to show where the warning was created)

Error: ./node_modules/core-js/modules/es.regexp.exec.js 1:3
Module parse failed: Unexpected character ‘’ (1:3)
You may need an appropriate loader to handle this file type, currently no loaders are configured to process this file. See Concepts | webpack

@ (webpack)-hot-middleware/client.js 1:205-249

If you need help please visit https://community.frontity.org/.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Error node:10424

item.title: Redirected page breaks
item.dc:creator: jeff
item.description:
Hi there,

I have a page that has a 301 redirection.

The Root template for the pages look like this

const Root = ({ state, actions, libraries }) => {
  const data = state.source.get(state.router.link);
  const post = data.isReady && !data.isError && !data.isCategory ? state.source[data.type][data.id] : null;
}

But the page breaks at const post as I get the usual Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'undefined') message. If I comment post out, the page redirects fine.

Do you have any idea why that is happening?

Thanks

2 posts - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Redirected page breaks

item.title: I have a problem with the 'frontity build' command.
item.dc:creator: romeroeinsten
item.description:
Error: list.es5.363de77e68c217a63acf.js from Terser
Error: error:0308010C:digital envelope routines::unsupported
at new Hash (node:internal/crypto/hash:69:19)
at Object.createHash (node:crypto:133:10)

item.title: Difficulty building and Serving the build files each time(during Development)
item.dc:creator: mtawheed.ad
item.description:
I have been using frontity to achieve headless wordpress. I get the data through REST API. I also wanted to get the plugin data as well. But when I tried to get the plugin data through the REST API on localhost:3000 I got CORS errors 403. But this didn’t happen due to incorrect authentication for the API but something else. As when I tried to use embedded frontity to get the data on Wordpress’s website I got no errors. But the issue with using the WP Site’s URL is that I have to build the file and then copy the files to htdocs, server and build folders in the WP Site’s folder to make it work. This building and serving takes alot of time, and this isn’t an ideal way of development of a website. Is there anyway to make the Frontity code on WP’s server without doing the building and then copying it to the server’s folders and then serving it?

4 posts - 3 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Difficulty building and Serving the build files each time(during Development)

item.title: Prediksi Xau-Usd!
item.dc:creator: cuanparapencari18
item.description:
Prediksi XAU/USD
Dalam Prakiraan Harga XAU/USD untuk tahun 2023, analis kami yakin harga Emas memiliki potensi untuk mencatatkan kenaikan kuat di tahun 2023 tetapi ada risiko penurunan yang cukup besar. Baca prakiraan lebih lanjut.

Harga emas bisa melemah jika ekonomi AS menghindari resesi dan The Fed menggandakan prospek kebijak
ORGANISASI YANG PALING MEMPENGARUHI XAU/USD
WGC (World Gold Council), organisasi pengembangan pasar untuk industri emas yang bertujuan untuk merangsang dan mempertahankan permintaan untuk komoditas itu.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Prediksi Xau-Usd!

item.title: Apa itu prediksi harga xauusd!
item.dc:creator: aseplawyers
item.description:
Prediksi Harga XAU/USD HARI INI: XAU/USD Tetap Bearish Menuju $1.650 Jelang Inflasi AS

Harga emas (XAUUSD) menerima penawaran untuk memperbarui harga terendah intraday karena membalikkan pantulan hari sebelumnya dari terendah mingguan menjelang Consumer Price Index (CPI) utama AS. Kelemahan terbaru logam dapat dikaitkan dengan bias hawkish atas langkah Fed selanjutnya, terutama setelah Risalah Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) terbaru. Selain itu, hal ini juga memberikan tekanan turun pada emas batangan yang menjadi berita utama seputar China karena AS meningkatkan kesulitan bagi pembuat chip dan Shanghai/Hong Kong dengan memperketat penguncian yang disebabkan oleh virus. Atau, jeda perdagangan sebelum CPI bergabung dengan stimulus China, dengan melalui intervensi housing market, untuk membatasi sisi bawah XAUUSD.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Apa itu prediksi harga xauusd!

item.description:
Is it possible that we can use Frontity with NextJs instead of React?

item.title: Test Frontity Blog Beginner Error 404 / Error 500
item.dc:creator: chanismont
item.description:
Hi! I just beginning to try some Frontity project out and It didn’t come out as I think it should be

I created the project and choose the mars-theme as recommended, then I run the project locally and the Test demo Blog should have worked 'cuz I haven’t do anything, but it didn’t work!
also, when I try to look into the project about Frontity in CodeSandbox, it has the same problem too!

How can I fix this problem? Or what did I do wrong?

I have:
node 16.13.0
npm 9.8.1
npx 9.8.1
yarn 1.22.19

Project Name: frontity-project-101

  • I still don’t have the WordPress account of my own and just trying to edit the demo blog as a beginner
  • and right now I just kinda want to see the normal one…

Oh! and if I try to add /wp-json behind the state.source.url?? umm this “https://test.frontity.org” one
it happens to go to Error 404 [Oops! 404 That page can’t be found]

aaand I still don’t know what happen or what I was doing, but hoping to find the way out soon!
Thank you!~

2 posts - 2 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Test Frontity Blog Beginner Error 404 / Error 500

item.title: Styling using regular css and mapping it with class name
item.dc:creator: mtawheed.ad
item.description:
Is it possible to style frontity code with regular external .css file and import it and map the styles with class name of the html tags as done in ReactJS. As styling it with Emotion library seems counter intuitive. The creation of components, specifying what html tag they are and then styling them is confusing to me as a React Developer.
For Example:
page2.css
.Frame62_3{
display: flex;
padding: 30px 50px;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
gap: 40px;
border-radius: 12px;
background: var(–gray-50, #F9FAFB);
box-shadow: 0px 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.10), 0px 10px 10px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
}
.txt1_3{
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-self: stretch;
color: var(–gray-500, #6D7280);
text-align: center;
font-family: Inter;
font-size: 20px;
font-style: normal;
font-weight: 600;
line-height: 150%;
}
.Frame54_3{
display: flex;
padding: 12px 20px;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
align-self: stretch;
border-radius: 6px;
border: 1px solid var(–gray-400, #9CA3AF);
}
.Website_3{
font-family: Inter;
font-size: 16px;
font-style: normal;
font-weight: 400;
line-height: 150%;
}
.btn2{
display: flex;
padding: 7px 9px;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
flex: 1 0 0;
border: 1px solid var(–gray-300, #D2D5DA);
background: none;
}
page2.jsx
…

Choose a Template

Select a Website Category
Next
...

2 posts - 2 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Styling using regular css and mapping it with class name

item.title: Apa itu trading emas forex!
item.dc:creator: maugzyahmad0
item.description:
Apa itu perdagangan Trading emas

Trading emas adalah aktivitas jual beli emas di pasar forex tanpa harus ada perpindahan aset emas secara fisik layaknya investasi emas konvensional. Jadi, dalam trading emas yang paling penting adalah nilai yang terdapat dalam emas tersebut. Sistem trading emas sendiri mirip dengan trading saham, forex, ataupun crypto. Dari keempat jenis trading tersebut, yang membedakan hanyalah objeknya.

Dalam dunia trading, emas merupakan mata uang dengan simbol XAU. Biasanya, mata uang XAU ini dikaitkan dengan nilai dolar AS (XAU/USD). Pergerakan naik turun nilai dolar AS bisa menjadi acuan kamu saat melakukan trading emas. Pasalnya, ketika dolar melemah biasanya harga emas akan naik. Kondisi ini menjadi saat tepat bagi kamu untuk menjual emas. Sebaliknya, apabila nilai dolar AS menguat maka menjadi saat yang tepat untuk membeli emas.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Apa itu trading emas forex!

item.title: Digital envelope routines:unsupported
item.dc:creator: amjad
item.description:
Hello,

I am experiencing issues while Run ‘npx frontity dev’

Some common errors: https://i.imgur.com/hhovIcq.png

Error: error:0308010C:digital envelope routines::unsupported
at new Hash (node: internal/crypto/hash:71:19)
at Object.createHash (node:crypto:133:10)
at module.exports (C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\webpack\lib\util\createHash.js:135:53)
at NormalModule._initBuildHash (C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\webpack\lib\NormalModule.js:417:16)
at handleParseError (C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\webpack\lib\NormalModule.js:471:10)
at C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\webpack\lib\NormalModule.js:503:5
at C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\webpack\lib\NormalModule.js:358:12
at C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\loader-runner\lib\LoaderRunner.js:373:3
at iterateNormalLoaders (C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\loader-runner\lib\LoaderRunner.js:214:10)
at iterateNormalLoaders (C:\Users\Amjad\Desktop\HeadlessWP\wpminds-headless\node_modules\loader-runner\lib\LoaderRunner.js:221:10)

I try ‘npx frontity dev --port 4000’

I have been struggling with this issue for several days and would greatly appreciate any help or suggestions.

Thank you.

8 posts - 5 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Digital envelope routines:unsupported
